tool_input.summary: To evaluate whether Juno observed dawnside magnetodisk radial force balance from ~20–80 RJ, you’ll typically need (1) magnetic field vectors (MAG/FGM), (2) plasma moments (density/temperature/flow; JADE), optionally (3) energetic-particle pressure (JEDI), plus (4) spacecraft geometry/coordinates (SPICE). In this catalog snapshot, the key Juno fields are available mainly as PDS3 volumes (FGM/JADE/JEDI) plus a PDS3 SPICE volume and a PDS4 Waves-derived electron density bundle.

candidates.title: JNO J 3 FGM CAL V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Calibrated Juno fluxgate magnetometer (FGM/MAG) data needed to compute magnetic pressure/tension and current-sheet/magnetodisk field structure for force-balance tests.

candidates.title: JNO SS 3 FGM CAL V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Additional calibrated Juno FGM dataset variant; useful for ensuring continuous coverage and cross-checking magnetometer-derived forces during relevant radial ranges.

candidates.title: JNO J JAD 5 MOMENTS V1.0
candidates.reasoning: JADE plasma moments provide density, temperature/pressure, and flow needed for centrifugal force and pressure-gradient terms in radial force balance between 20–80 RJ.

candidates.title: JNO J SW JAD 3 CALIBRATED V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Calibrated JADE data products can complement the moments volume (e.g., for species/energy coverage) when deriving plasma parameters relevant to magnetodisk equilibrium.

candidates.title: JNO J JED 3 CDR V1.0
candidates.reasoning: JEDI calibrated/derived energetic particle data can be used to estimate energetic-particle pressure contributions to the radial force balance in the outer/middle magnetosphere.

candidates.title: Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies
candidates.reasoning: Provides an independent electron density estimate (from Waves), useful for mass density/Alfvén speed and validating JADE-derived density in dawnside magnetodisk intervals.

candidates.title: JUNO SPICE FILES
candidates.reasoning: SPICE kernels supply spacecraft trajectory/attitude and coordinate transforms needed to select dawnside intervals and compute radial distance (RJ) and local time for 20–80 RJ analysis.

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
Is Jupiter's dawnside magnetodisk approximately in radial force balance between 20 and 80 R_J as observed by Juno?

parts.args: {"summary":"To evaluate whether Juno observed dawnside magnetodisk radial force balance from ~20–80 RJ, you’ll typically need (1) magnetic field vectors (MAG/FGM), (2) plasma moments (density/temperature/flow; JADE), optionally (3) energetic-particle pressure (JEDI), plus (4) spacecraft geometry/coordinates (SPICE). In this catalog snapshot, the key Juno fields are available mainly as PDS3 volumes (FGM/JADE/JEDI) plus a PDS3 SPICE volume and a PDS4 Waves-derived electron density bundle.","candidates":[{"dataset_id":"JNO-J-3-FGM-CAL-V1.0","path":null,"title":"JNO J 3 FGM CAL V1.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Calibrated Juno fluxgate magnetometer (FGM/MAG) data needed to compute magnetic pressure/tension and current-sheet/magnetodisk field structure for force-balance tests."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-SS-3-FGM-CAL-V1.0","path":null,"title":"JNO SS 3 FGM CAL V1.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Additional calibrated Juno FGM dataset variant; useful for ensuring continuous coverage and cross-checking magnetometer-derived forces during relevant radial ranges."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-J-JAD-5-MOMENTS-V1.0","path":null,"title":"JNO J JAD 5 MOMENTS V1.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"JADE plasma moments provide density, temperature/pressure, and flow needed for centrifugal force and pressure-gradient terms in radial force balance between 20–80 RJ."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-J_SW-JAD-3-CALIBRATED-V1.0","path":null,"title":"JNO J SW JAD 3 CALIBRATED V1.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Calibrated JADE data products can complement the moments volume (e.g., for species/energy coverage) when deriving plasma parameters relevant to magnetodisk equilibrium."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-J-JED-3-CDR-V1.0","path":null,"title":"JNO J JED 3 CDR V1.0","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"JEDI calibrated/derived energetic particle data can be used to estimate energetic-particle pressure contributions to the radial force balance in the outer/middle magnetosphere."},{"dataset_id":"urn:nasa:pds:juno_waves_electron-density::1.0","path":null,"title":"Juno Waves Electron Densities from Characteristic Plasma Wave Frequencies","mission":"Juno","node":"ppi","pds_version":"PDS4","reasoning":"Provides an independent electron density estimate (from Waves), useful for mass density/Alfvén speed and validating JADE-derived density in dawnside magnetodisk intervals."},{"dataset_id":"JNO-J/E/SS-SPICE-6-V1.0","path":null,"title":"JUNO SPICE FILES","mission":"Juno","node":"naif","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"SPICE kernels supply spacecraft trajectory/attitude and coordinate transforms needed to select dawnside intervals and compute radial distance (RJ) and local time for 20–80 RJ analysis."}]}
